violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -2 cases of single use containers stored on floor in dry storage area.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Portable hand sink is out of fresh water and hand soap.

Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. -HACCP logs last filled out in November 2025. *Staff stated company is going to online logs but staff have not yet been trained on new system.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Spicy Mayo was opened and mixed yesterday and left in room temperature cabinet. *Product disposed of.
